title: oedina erecta
intro: Oedina erecta, also known as the Borneo cedar, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oedina erecta include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Oedina erecta include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make tea, capsules, or other medicinal products.
